channel.title: Spring Lake Surf Conditions — Remsen Ave
channel.description: Daily 7-day surf forecast for Remsen Ave & Ocean Ave N, Spring Lake, NJ

item.title: 7-Day Surf Forecast — 2026-07-13 to 2026-07-19
item.description: 1 IDEAL, 2 INTERESTING, 4 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days. Mon 2026-07-13: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 1.9 ft @ 6.6 sec, wind 2 kt WNW, water 74°F. Low tide: 00:49, 12:44. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Tue 2026-07-14: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.1 ft @ 5.7 sec, wind 6 kt SW, water 73°F. Low tide: 01:44, 13:42. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: period too short (5.7 sec). Wed 2026-07-15: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.6 ft @ 5.2 sec, wind 9 kt WSW, water 73°F. Low tide: 02:37, 14:38. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.6 ft); period too short (5.2 sec). Thu 2026-07-16: 🟢 IDEAL — best window 12:00, 1.4 ft @ 8.0 sec, wind 9 kt WNW, water 75°F. Low tide: 03:25, 15:30. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Fri 2026-07-17: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 15:00, 1.6 ft @ 6.8 sec, wind 4 kt SW, water 74°F. Low tide: 04:11, 16:20. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Sat 2026-07-18: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.4 ft @ 5.0 sec, wind 3 kt NE, water 73°F. Low tide: 04:55, 17:10. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.4 ft); period too short (5.0 sec); wind direction off (NE). Sun 2026-07-19: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.3 ft @ 6.3 sec, wind 8 kt SW, water 73°F. Low tide: 05:40, 18:02. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.3 ft).
item.content:encoded:
1 IDEAL, 2 INTERESTING, 4 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days.

  • Mon 2026-07-13: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 1.9 ft @ 6.6 sec, wind 2 kt WNW, water 74°F. Low tide: 00:49, 12:44. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Tue 2026-07-14: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.1 ft @ 5.7 sec, wind 6 kt SW, water 73°F. Low tide: 01:44, 13:42. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: period too short (5.7 sec).
  • Wed 2026-07-15: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.6 ft @ 5.2 sec, wind 9 kt WSW, water 73°F. Low tide: 02:37, 14:38. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.6 ft); period too short (5.2 sec).
  • Thu 2026-07-16: 🟢 IDEAL — best window 12:00, 1.4 ft @ 8.0 sec, wind 9 kt WNW, water 75°F. Low tide: 03:25, 15:30. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Fri 2026-07-17: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 15:00, 1.6 ft @ 6.8 sec, wind 4 kt SW, water 74°F. Low tide: 04:11, 16:20. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Sat 2026-07-18: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.4 ft @ 5.0 sec, wind 3 kt NE, water 73°F. Low tide: 04:55, 17:10. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.4 ft); period too short (5.0 sec); wind direction off (NE).
  • Sun 2026-07-19: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.3 ft @ 6.3 sec, wind 8 kt SW, water 73°F. Low tide: 05:40, 18:02. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.3 ft).
